classes.name: pybragi.base.scribe_log.ScribeHandler

methods.name: pybragi.base.scribe_log.ScribeHandler.__init__
documentation: Open the specified file and use it as the stream for logging.

methods.name: pybragi.base.scribe_log.ScribeHandler._open
documentation:
Open the current base file with the (original) mode and encoding.
Return the resulting stream.

methods.name: pybragi.base.scribe_log.ScribeHandler.emit
documentation:
Emit a record.

If the stream was not opened because 'delay' was specified in the
constructor, open it before calling the superclass's emit.

methods.name: pybragi.base.scribe_log.ScribeHandler.record
documentation:
Emit a record.

If a formatter is specified, it is used to format the record.
The record is then written to the stream with a trailing newline.  If
exception information is present, it is formatted using
traceback.print_exception and appended to the stream.  If the stream
has an 'encoding' attribute, it is used to encode the message before
output to the stream.
A handler class which writes formatted logging records to Scrbie Server
